privileged_info_summary: Task creates a new demographics section in LibreHealth EHR, a real open-source Electronic Health Records system. The metadata correctly specifies the expected configuration: group title 'RPM', field ID 'rpm_device_serial', field label 'Device Serial Number', and data type '1' (Text) in the DEM (Demographics) form. The task environment contains 9,375 real NHANES patients (2011-2012 survey period) from the official LibreHealthIO repository. All metadata configuration claims are verified as accurate and correspond to the task requirements. The NHANES patient data is not synthetic but real-world survey data integrated into the LibreHealth EHR system.
